results.description:
Basket.handleFees() (contracts/Basket.sol#110-129) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- fee = startSupply * feePct / (BASE - feePct) (contracts/Basket.sol#118)
	- _mint(publisher,fee * (BASE - factory.ownerSplit()) / BASE) (contracts/Basket.sol#120)

	- [_mint(publisher,fee * (BASE - factory.ownerSplit()) / BASE)](contracts/Basket.sol#L120)
